ab: Shuya su musa beygi hug?
en: How do you go to the block-house?

ab: Pgriq ku rulu musa beygi.
en: I drive to the block-house.

ab: Shuya musa sapah spuhan ka hiya?
en: How does he go to the hospital?

ab: Mksa musa sapah spuhan ka hiya.
en: He walks to the hospital.

ab: Shuya su musa Pun-ghu hug?
en: How do you go to Penghu?

ab: Teapa ku sapah skaya musa Punghu.
en: I go to Penghu by plane.

ab: Shuya su musa Pung-hu hug?
en: How do you go to Penghu?

ab: Teapa ku asu musa Punghu.
en: I go to Penghu by boat.

ab: Teapa su manu musa sapah?
en: How do you go home?

ab: Teapa ku ceyyun musa sapah.
en: I go home by MRT.

ab: Teapa manu musa sapah pyasan ka Lituk hug?
en: How does Lituk go to school?

ab: Teapa rulu qrngul musa sapah pyasan ka Lituk.
en: Lituk goes to school by train.

ab: Teapa manu musa pnrhulan ka Basaw hug?
en: How does Basaw go to church?

ab: Teapa ddeynsya musa pnrhulan ka Basaw.
en: Basaw goes to church by bicycle.

ab: Teapa su ceyyun musa sapah pyasan hug?
en: Do you go to school by MRT?

ab: Uxay! Teapa ku basu musa sapah pyasan.
en: No, I go to school by bus.

ab: Teapa su ddeynsya musa sapah pyasan hug?
en: Do you go to school by bicycle?

ab: Iq! Teapa ku ddeynsya musa sapah pyasan.
en: Yes, I go to school by bicycle.

ab: Teapa su kawtey musa Kaw-syung hug?
en: Do you go to Kaohsiung by High Speed Rail?

ab: Iq! Teapa ku kawtey musa Kawsyung.
en: Yes, I go to Kaohsiung by High Speed Rail.

ab: Musa su Tay-tung o teapa su rulu qrngul? Ya su teapa sapah skaya?
ch: A:你去台東搭火車還是搭飛機?
en: Are you going to Taitung by train or by plane?

ab: Teapa ku sapah skaya, ida ini biyaw ka sapah skaya dha ka rulu qrngul.
ch: B:我搭飛機，搭飛機比搭火車快。
en: I will take the plane because it is faster than the train.

ab: Musa su pnrhulan o teapa su basu? Ya su mgriq rulu?
ch: A:你去教會搭公車還是開車?
en: Are you going to drive to the church or take the bus?

ab: Pgriq ku rulu musa pnrhulan, ida blayiq kiya mgriq rulu dha ka teapa basu.
ch: B:我開車去教會，開車比搭公車方便。
en: I will drive to the church because it is more convenient than the bus.

ab: Sdalih caw-s ka sapah namu hug?
en: Is the market close to your house?

ab: Uxay ka sdalih, ida ku teapa utubay musa caw-s.
ch: B:不近，我都騎摩托車去超市。
en: No, it is not, so I always ride the motorcycle to the market.

ab: Sdalih yow-cyu ka sapah pyasan hug?
en: Is the post office close to the school?

ab: Sdalih bi! Mksa do dhuq da.
en: Yes, it is within walking distance.

ab: Sdalih tgaan rulu ka sapah uqan hug?
en: Is the restaurant close to the station?

ab: Miyah nganguc sapah tgaan rulu mksa 5 spngan do kika dhuq da.
ch: B:出車站再走五分鐘就到了。
en: It only takes five minutes after you walk out of the station.
